speakers.name: Hon. Sarah Johnson
speakers.bio: Judge Johnson has served on the District Court for over a decade, specializing in civil litigation and experimental judicial procedures. She is a graduate of Yale Law and a frequent lecturer on modern legal ethics.

speakers.name: Robert Chen, Esq.
speakers.bio: Robert Chen leads the M&A division at Latham & Watkins in Dallas. With over 20 years of experience in multi-billion dollar transactions, he provides invaluable insights into the life of Big Law partners.

speakers.name: Maria Garcia
speakers.bio: Maria Garcia represents the advocacy arm of the local government, focusing on urban development and public housing legislation. She holds a JD from UT Austin and is a champion for community-led legal reform.

speakers.name: David Miller
speakers.bio: David is one of the region's most sought-after criminal defense specialists. His series on courtroom psychology has become a staple for JMPLS students looking to enter the world of litigation.

speakers.name: Elena Rodriguez
speakers.bio: Elena oversees legal operations for a major fintech startup. She offers a unique perspective on the intersection of technology, finance, and the law.
